Name: femaDeclarationString
Title: FEMA Declaration String
Description: Agency standard method for uniquely identifying Stafford Act declarations - Concatenation of declaration type, disaster number and state code. Ex: DR-4393-NC

Name: disasterNumber
Title: Disaster Number
Description: Sequentially assigned number used to designate an event or incident declared as a disaster. For more information on the disaster process, please visit https://www.fema.gov/disasters/how-declared

Name: state
Title: State
Description: The name or phrase describing the U.S. state, district, or territory

Name: declarationType
Title: Declaration Type
Description: Two character code that defines if this is a major disaster, fire management, or emergency declaration. For more information on the disaster process, please visit https://www.fema.gov/disasters/how-declared

Name: declarationDate
Title: Declaration Date
Description: Date the disaster was declared

Name: fyDeclared
Title: FY Declared
Description: Fiscal year in which the disaster was declared

Name: incidentType
Title: Incident Type
Description: The primary or official type of incident such as fire or flood. Secondary incident types may have been designated. See the designatedIncidentTypes field. For more information on incident types, please visit https://www.fema.gov/disasters/how-declared.

Name: declarationTitle
Title: Declaration Title
Description: Title for the disaster

Name: ihProgramDeclared
Title: IH Program Declared
Description: Denotes whether the Individuals and Households program was declared for this disaster. For more information on the program, please visit https://www.fema.gov/assistance/individual/program. To determine which FEMA events have been authorized to receive Individual Assistance, use both ihProgramDeclared and iaProgramDeclared. For more information see https://www.fema.gov/about/openfema/faq

Name: iaProgramDeclared
Title: IA Program Declared
Description: Denotes whether the Individual Assistance program was declared for this disaster. For more information on the program, please visit https://www.fema.gov/assistance/individual/program. To determine which FEMA events have been authorized to receive Individual Assistance, use both ihProgramDeclared and iaProgramDeclared. For more information see https://www.fema.gov/about/openfema/faq

Name: paProgramDeclared
Title: PA Program Declared
Description: Denotes whether the Public Assistance program was declared for this disaster. For more information on the program, please visit https://www.fema.gov/assistance/public/program-overview

Name: hmProgramDeclared
Title: HM Program Declared
Description: Denotes whether the Hazard Mitigation program was declared for this disaster. For more information on the program, please visit https://www.fema.gov/grants/mitigation/hazard-mitigation

Name: incidentBeginDate
Title: Incident Begin Date
Description: Date the incident itself began

Name: incidentEndDate
Title: Incident End Date
Description: Date the incident itself ended

Name: disasterCloseoutDate
Title: Disaster Closeout Date
Description: Date all financial transactions for all programs are completed

Name: tribalRequest
Title: Tribal Request
Description: Denotes that a declaration request was submitted directly to the President, independently of a state, by a Tribal Nation.

Name: fipsStateCode
Title: FIPS State Code
Description: FIPS two-digit numeric code used to identify the United States, the District of Columbia, US territories, outlying areas of the US and freely associated states

Name: fipsCountyCode
Title: FIPS County Code
Description: FIPS three-digit numeric code used to identify counties and county equivalents in the United States, the District of Columbia, US territories, outlying areas of the US and freely associated states. Please note that Indian Reservations are not counties and thus will not have a FIPS county code, please utilize the placeCode field instead. If the designation is made for the entire state, this value will be 000 as multiple (all) counties cannot be entered.

Name: placeCode
Title: Place Code
Description: A unique code system FEMA uses internally to recognize locations that takes the numbers '99' + the 3-digit county FIPS code. There are some declared locations that dont have recognized FIPS county codes in which case we assigned a unique identifier

Name: designatedArea
Title: Designated Area
Description: The name or phrase describing the geographic area that was included in the declaration

Name: declarationRequestNumber
Title: Declaration Request Number
Description: Number assigned to the declaration request

Name: lastIAFilingDate
Title: Last IA Filing Date
Description: Last date when IA requests can be filed. Data available after 1998 only. The date only applies if IA has been approved for the disaster.

Name: incidentId
Title: Incident Identifier
Description: Unique identifier for an incident. Incidents are events that may or may not become declared disasters.

Name: region
Title: Region
Description: Number (1-10) used to represent the FEMA region where the disaster occurred.

Name: designatedIncidentTypes
Title: Declared Incident types
Description: A comma-separated list of incident types designated for the disaster. The primary incident type is described in the incidentType field. Codes are: 0: Not applicable; 1: Explosion; 2: Straight-Line Winds; 3: Tidal Wave; 4: Tropical Storm; 5: Winter Storm; 8: Tropical Depression; A: Tsunami; B: Biological; C: Coastal Storm; D: Drought; E: Earthquake; F: Flood; G: Freezing; H: Hurricane; I: Terrorist; J: Typhoon; K: Dam/Levee Break; L: Chemical; M: Mud/Landslide; N: Nuclear; O: Severe Ice Storm; P: Fishing Losses; Q: Crop Losses; R: Fire; S: Snowstorm; T: Tornado; U: Civil Unrest; V: Volcanic Eruption; W: Severe Storm; X: Toxic Substances; Y: Human Cause; Z: Other

Name: lastRefresh
Title: Last Refresh
Description: Date the record was last updated in the API data store

Name: hash
Title: Hash
Description: MD5 Hash of the fields and values of the record

Name: id
Title: ID
Description: Unique ID assigned to the record
